pages.text: Isn't eating blueprints like consuming knowledge in another form? Besides, this wrapper tastes quite nice~$(br)Grants consumer:$(li)1-minute Iron V$(li)2-minute Strength II$(br)Also unlocks the Final Tome recipe progression (ignores prerequisite requirements).$(br)Left-clicking a minion that requires Final Tome learning replicates one corresponding minion with a 5-minute lifespan. Single-use only, lasts 5 minutes.
